title: Arthropocolypse
body:
# Arthropocolypse is a mod focused on adding bugs


![Bugs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c605a44bfe2e986af51ebbd1e548648db173bb18.png) ——————————————————————————————————
**This mod adds 12 mobs and some items** - Field Cricket - can breed with carrot, carrot piece - Prairie Grasshopper - can find on Plains

- Ice Crawlers - can find on Taiga

- Stag Beetle - can find on Forest - can breed with apple, sliced melon

- Worker Ant - Soldier Ant - can find on Hill

- Wharf Roach - can find on Beach / Stony Shore

- Platerodrilus - can find on Forest - can be tamed with any type of log - can equip saddle

- Mealworm Beetle - can find on Forest - can breed with sliced melon, apple, carrot, carrot piece

- Millipede - can find on Lush Caves / Mineshaft

- Behemoth Desert Scorpion - Scarab - [ BOSS ]  Behemoth Desert Spider

![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf4571963c708515f7532804f4b1ffc540ca538e.png) —————————————————————————————————— some are in development
There will be more content in the future!

Discord: [https://discord.gg/QgRY9wRJ5m](https://discord.gg/QgRY9wRJ5m)
